title: Stratapath TD
description:
KEY FEATURES• 3 base towers with 6 upgrade paths and 3 tiers

• Tower modification with 96 options

• 8 enemy factions each with their own abilities, maps & bosses

• Pathfinding based enemy movement

• Full control over tower target priority with customizable layered conditions

Build mazes out of towers. Synergizing, placement, movement, targeting, types and effects to defeat ever increasing waves of enemies over 16 maps, 8 factions & 8 bosses.

Target Priority with Layered Conditionsrequired to get the most of out of your towers and crucial against certain enemy factions.

Tower ModificationBefore each level you get to pick 1 of 6 modifications that apply to all levels going forward.

Pathing Based Enemy MovementCore of the game is exploiting enemy movement to get the most out of your towers.
description_short: Design a tower maze, upgrade, change their targeting with layered priorities and customize their abilities with 98 different options to fight against 8 factions each with their own abilities and boss over 16 maps.
